description: open invoices and dated items land in the right weeks
assertions: every figure comes from tools/finance.py cashflow with computed_by
weeks carry inflow, outflow, net, and running_net as exact-decimal strings
paid and disputed invoices never appear

description: overdue receivables are never guessed into a week
assertions: overdue amounts are totaled in overdue_receivables only
a gap points at ar-review for chasing
no bucket contains an overdue amount on an invented date

description: undated estimates and scheduled rows are gaps, not buckets
assertions: the undated estimate totals into undated_outflows with a gap naming the fix
the undated scheduled row is an unbucketable_scheduled gap

description: redacted output is safe to leave the machine
assertions: amounts are bands written with to (for example 1k to 5k)
_redacted is true and the raw records are untouched
redacted output is never fed back into bookkeeping
